description.value: GPX Diamonds, located in New Delhi, specializes in a magnificent array of IGI certified lab-grown diamonds. Their exquisite collection features a diverse range of shapes, including oval, heart, emerald, and radiant cuts, alongside stunning Fancy Vivid Pink, Intense Blue, Vivid Yellow, and Vivid Blue diamonds in various carats and clarities.

bio.value: GPX Diamonds is designed for jewelers. Check out our website, you might find the diamonds you're looking for and really like.

media_assets.product_name: 1.56 CT Oval F / VS1 Lab Grown Diamond
media_assets.visual_description: A single, brilliant oval-cut diamond is held by black-tipped tweezers against a plain grey background. The diamond exhibits strong sparkle and fire, appearing colorless with no visible inclusions. Its elongated oval shape is clearly defined, showcasing its facets and light performance.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A brilliant oval-cut loose diamond held by black tweezers against a grey background, showcasing its colorless appearance and sparkle.

media_assets.product_name: 1.51 Carat Intense Blue Lab Grown Emerald Diamond, SI1 Clarity
media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a single, loose emerald-cut diamond with a vibrant blue hue. Its rectangular shape features step-cut facets that create parallel lines and geometric patterns, reflecting light. Small, dark specks, indicative of inclusions, are visible within the stone, presented against a plain, light grey studio background.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A vibrant blue emerald-cut loose diamond, showcasing its step facets and internal clarity characteristics against a grey background.

media_assets.product_name: Radiant cut 1.40 Ct Vivid Blue Lab Grown Diamond VS1 quality
media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a single, loose radiant cut diamond, oriented vertically, against a plain grey background. The diamond exhibits a vibrant, vivid blue color with strong internal brilliance and sparkle from its numerous facets. Its rectangular shape features distinct cut corners, and the stone appears eye-clean with no visible inclusions.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Close-up of a loose, vivid blue radiant cut diamond, showcasing its brilliant facets and rectangular shape with cut corners.

media_assets.product_name: 2.14 Carat Vivid Blue Lab Grown Emerald Diamond, VS1 Clarity
media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a single, loose emerald-cut gemstone with a vibrant blue hue. Its rectangular shape features step-cut facets that create parallel lines and geometric reflections, indicating a high level of polish and clarity. The stone is presented against a plain, neutral grey background, emphasizing its color and cut.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A vivid blue emerald-cut loose diamond, showcasing its step facets and brilliant reflections against a grey background.

media_assets.product_name: 3.01Ct Intense Pink Lab Grown Emerald Diamond, VS1 Clarity
media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a single, loose emerald-cut diamond. The diamond exhibits a distinct fancy pink or peachy color, with strong internal reflections and step-cut facets creating parallel lines and geometric patterns. It appears eye-clean with no visible inclusions, presented against a plain, solid grey background.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A large, loose emerald-cut diamond with a fancy pink color, showcasing its step-cut facets against a plain grey background.

media_assets.product_name: Special 4.10 carat radiant diamond H, VS1 Lab Diamond

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: The diamond shows excellent sparkle and light performance, typical of a well-cut stone. The cut corners of the radiant shape are clearly visible.

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a single, loose radiant cut diamond against a plain white background. The diamond exhibits strong brilliance and fire, with numerous facets reflecting light in a complex pattern. Its appearance is very bright and clear, showing no visible inclusions or yellow tint.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Close-up of a brilliant, eye-clean radiant cut diamond, appearing colorless and sparkling against a pure white background.

media_assets.product_name: 2.55 Carat VS1 Clarity Pear Shape Vivid Yellow Lab Grown Diamond
media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a single, loose pear-shaped diamond with a vibrant yellow hue. Its numerous facets reflect light, creating a brilliant sparkle across its surface. The diamond is presented against a clean, plain white background, emphasizing its color and cut.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A vibrant yellow pear-shaped loose diamond, showcasing its brilliant facets against a clean white background.

media_assets.product_name: 2.13 carat Emerald step cut diamond | Vivid Pink Diamond
media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a single, loose emerald step-cut diamond held by black-tipped tweezers against a plain grey background. The diamond exhibits a distinct pink hue with strong saturation, showing clear facets and internal reflections characteristic of its cut. Its surface appears clean and free of visible inclusions, suggesting good clarity.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A vivid pink emerald step-cut diamond held by black tweezers against a grey background, showcasing its facets and color.

media_assets.product_name: Pear-Cut Crystal Flower Dainty Necklace in 14k/18k Gold

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: multiple stones, flower cluster design, dainty style

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a dainty necklace featuring a curved bar pendant composed of multiple flower-like clusters. Each cluster is formed by pear-cut stones arranged around a central round brilliant stone, all set in yellow gold. The necklace is presented against a clean white background, highlighting its sparkling, eye-clean appearance.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Dainty yellow gold necklace with a curved bar pendant featuring multiple flower clusters made of pear and round brilliant stones.

media_assets.product_name: Multi-Round Diamond Necklace Crafted in Hallmarked Gold – Everyday Elegance

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: Multiple small round diamonds are pave-set to form five distinct circular clusters, linked by a delicate chain.

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a delicate yellow gold necklace featuring five circular diamond-set motifs arranged in a gentle curve. Each motif is densely set with numerous small, sparkling round diamonds, creating a floral or starburst pattern within a diamond-encrusted halo. The necklace is presented against a clean white background, highlighting its intricate details and brilliant appearance.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Yellow gold necklace with five circular diamond-set motifs, each featuring a starburst pattern of small round diamonds.

media_assets.product_name: Timeless Trio Diamond Halo Pendant Necklace in Hallmarked 14K/18K Gold

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: trio design, multiple diamonds, delicate chain

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a gold pendant necklace featuring a trio of diamond-set motifs. The central motif is a round brilliant diamond surrounded by a halo of smaller diamonds, flanked by two pear-shaped diamonds, each also encircled by a diamond halo. The necklace is presented against a clean white background, highlighting its intricate design and sparkling stones.
media_assets.media_alt_text: Gold necklace with a trio of diamond pendants: a central round brilliant halo flanked by two pear-shaped diamond halos.

media_assets.product_name: Halo Round Diamond Necklace in Hallmarked Gold

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: seven round diamonds arranged in a floral cluster design

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a delicate yellow gold necklace featuring a flower-shaped pendant composed of seven round brilliant-cut diamonds. The diamonds appear bright and eye-clean, set in prongs to form a symmetrical cluster. The necklace is presented against a clean white background, highlighting its elegant design.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A delicate yellow gold necklace with a flower-shaped pendant made of seven sparkling round brilliant diamonds on a white background.

media_assets.product_name: Princess and Pear Cut Diamond Earrings in Hallmarked Gold

visual_features.additional_visual_notes: hoop style earrings, alternating pear and princess cut diamonds

media_assets.visual_description: The image displays a pair of yellow gold hoop earrings, each adorned with alternating pear-cut and princess-cut diamonds. The diamonds appear colorless and eye-clean, set in a secure prong and channel-like setting along the outer edge of the hoops. The product is presented against a clean white background, highlighting its intricate design and sparkling gemstones.
media_assets.media_alt_text: A pair of yellow gold hoop earrings featuring alternating pear and princess cut diamonds, presented on a white background.

catalog_items.alt_text: 2 Carat Pear-Shaped Diamond Ring

social_source.caption:
This is a beautiful diamond ring with a 2 carat pear-shaped diamond in the center. The center diamond is IGI certified, which means it has been checked and approved by a trusted gem experts' group.

The ring is made of gold, and you can choose from three different types of gold:

14k gold
18k gold
22k gold
You can also choose from three colors of gold:

Yellow Gold
White Gold
Rose Gold
No matter which type or color of gold you choose, we guarantee that it is pure. The gold has been checked and approved by a trusted third-party group.

The ring also has small side diamonds. These diamonds are between 0.10 carat and 0.15 carat each. They add extra sparkle to the ring.

In summary:

The ring has a 2 carat pear-shaped center diamond.
The center diamond is IGI certified.
You can choose from 14k, 18k, or 22k gold.
The gold can be yellow, white, or rose.
The gold is guaranteed pure and certified by a third-party.
The ring has small side diamonds between 0.10 carat and 0.15 carat.
This ring is perfect for anyone who loves diamonds and wants a beautiful, certified piece of jewelry.

reviews.text: I recently purchased a pair of diamonds and couldn't be happier with my experience! The quality is exceptional brilliant sparkle, perfect cut, and exactly as described. The pricing was unbeatable for such high quality stones, and the service was smooth and professional from start to finish. Highly recommended for anyone looking for genuine diamonds at great value. reviews.author: Chandhra KV
reviews.text: I am really amazed with the diamond and the craftmen work. I was initially skeptical to buy expensive diamonds online. But Mr. Nipun Bakshi is really amazing person who helped in understading the authenticity and quality of work they do. Most interesting is transparent communication on the making process. Happy to own 7.01 carat Diamond at amazing price. Absolute brilliant!!!
